content.en:
The Holy Soul is the ultimate pursuit of the Supreme Domain Ancestors, and the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Top Ten Holy Gate Supreme Ancestors and those four-star kings of the Ghost Fox Organization, their pursuit is to condense the Holy Soul.

But in fact, how many people can condense the Holy Soul?

I don't know how many Supreme Domain Ancestors have cultivated for endless years, and they are almost about to enter the demon, but they have not condensed the Holy Soul, and even fell and died one by one on the way to seek opportunities.

Even if he didn't fall, it was only after the despair of endless years that he dispelled this idea, and chose to impact to the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm and give up condensing the Holy Soul.

Therefore, there are too few people among the Supreme Domain Ancestors who can condense the Holy Soul, and even if they are the Holy Endowment, it is difficult to condense the Holy Endowment.

After all, the Holy Endowed only had an advantage in cultivating the Holy Technique, but he had no advantage in condensing the Holy Soul.

Every genius who can condense the Holy Soul at the level of the strongest domain ancestor, after becoming an invincible domain ancestor, is not weaker than the Holy Endowment, and will even surpass the ordinary Saint Endowment.

Ye Tian also didn't expect that the Ghost Fox Organization would have such a genius.

"It's kind of fun to be under pressure!"

Ye Tian smiled, without the slightest hint of panic.

"Laugh?"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor frowned, definitely things might be a little unexpected, so he didn't want to waste time.

Immediately.

The Qingyang Domain Ancestor urged the projection sword of the Taichen Sword.

The Taichen Sword was not an ordinary holy relic, but a powerful holy relic ranked among the top 100 on the holy relic list, even if it was a projection sword, its power was comparable to that of a holy relic ranked within a thousand on the holy relic list.

What's more, the Taichen Sword Projection was able to unleash a terrifying blow, which was enough to kill some powerful Invincible Domain Ancestors.

Bang!!!!

The golden Taichen Sword emerged from the body of the Qingyang Domain Ancestor, like a giant sword of ten thousand zhang, and its coercion shocked the Endless Territory.

"It's ...... Taichen Sword !!!"

"No, it's not the real Taichen Sword, it's the projection sword of the Taichen Sword!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This projection is similar to the Battle Realm Tower projection of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and it is actually a physical sword that can exist alone.

Basically, the top 100 holy relics on the list of holy relics, using some special secret methods, and paying some costs, can cultivate and breed a projection thing.

For example, Ye Tian's Creation Mixed Yuan Well, if he knew the secret technique of cultivating projection things, after paying some price, he could also create a projection version of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well.

It's a pity that he doesn't know that kind of secret art, and he doesn't make that kind of projection of holy relics, because there is no need.

Even if it was manufactured, he didn't dare to use it, for fear that the secret of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well would be revealed, and at that time, it would not be some supreme domain ancestors, but no superior domain ancestors, or even ancestors.

The appearance of the Taichen Sword Projection Sword did make Ye Tian feel the real crisis.

At this time, Ye Tian cast the Time Divine Technique-Time Fragment!

He wants to get a glimpse of the future, otherwise it's easy to get caught up.

Click!!!

A corner of the future appeared in Ye Tian's sight.

In the future picture, Ye Tian did not dodge the blow of the Taichen Sword, and even the Eternal Saint Technique did not freeze the Taichen Sword, and was shattered by the Taichen Sword's sword, and it crashed into his body.

This sword, he tried his best, but he was still hit hard.

A projection holy object like the Taichen Sword can only be used once by the Qingyang Domain Ancestor in a short period of time.

Ye Tian was ready to escape into the depths of the void to heal his injuries, and after his injuries recovered, he would immediately fight with the Qingyang Domain Ancestor again.

But just as he was about to escape into the depths of the void, the Qingyang Domain Ancestor's body exuded a gray light, and that light turned into a small knife, instantly piercing his body.

Then, the gray light wore away his soul, and the connection between the dark and the darkness was tightened, and it struck through the endless dark forbidden realm into the unknown.

That place is—

"Xuanxu Holy Realm!"

Ye Tian was very surprised, this corner of the future showed the scene of him being bombarded.

Of course, this future corner is not fixed, but only the most likely scene to occur without intervention.

"That's the Divine Technique of Cause and Effect - Fruitless Destruction !!!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Cause and Effect Sacred Technique was very rare, and although Ye Tian had many Divine Endowments, he did not have any Cause and Effect Sacred Endowments, so he did not try to cultivate any Cause and Effect Sacred Techniques.

Moreover, the Cause and Effect Sacred Technique is not so easy to cultivate, it is too difficult to get started.

In the absence of the Divine Endowment of Cause and Effect, I am afraid that even the Invincible Domain Ancestor would be able to cultivate a Divine Technique of Cause and Effect to the Beginner or Minor Realm.

"Qingyang Domain Ancestor actually knows the Cause and Effect Holy Technique, and that Cause and Effect Holy Technique is afraid that he has cultivated to the Dacheng realm, it seems that he must have an amazing chance,"

Ye Tian thought.

From the future picture, when the Qingyang Domain Ancestor erupted with all his might, the Holy Soul was revealed.

The Holy Soul, the Taichen Sword's Projection Sword, coupled with the Cause and Effect Divine Technique-Fruitless Destruction, finally killed his copy body, and then attacked his body from afar.

Although the power of the Cause and Effect Saint Technique was somewhat weaker across the long territory, and his body had the protection of the Xuanxu Saint Realm and the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, even if the strength of the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was strong, there was no way to kill him through the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, but it could hurt him.

In addition, his replica body must have fallen.

But the premise of all this was that Ye Tian didn't know Qingyang Domain Ancestor's plan, but now that he knew it, it was a little difficult for Qingyang Domain Ancestor to kill him.

Ye Tian knew very well that his strength could not compete with the Qingyang Domain Ancestor at all.

Even if he is evil, he has to admit that his strength is far inferior to that of Qingyang Domain Ancestor now.

Therefore, he had to complete a breakthrough before he could confront the Qingyang Domain Ancestor, and even kill the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

"Then break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Eternal Imperishable Holy Body, break it for me!"

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's body suddenly collapsed, and the power of the endless forbidden avenue sheltered Ye Tian, and the endless rules rippled, allowing Ye Tian's body to undergo a perfect transformation.

At this moment, his body is reorganized little by little, this is a breakthrough that breaks and then stands!

And this process cannot be interrupted at all.

Qingyang Domain Ancestor could only watch Ye Tian break through, and there was nothing he could do.

"This is the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, which is impacting the Extreme Realm!"

The Qingyang Domain Ancestor didn't know much about the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, he only knew that it was the First Holy Body of the Dark Holy Domain, and as for how powerful the Eternal Immortal Holy Body of the Extreme Realm was, he didn't know either.

"It shouldn't increase my strength too much, I should still be able to kill him!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor muttered in his heart.

However, his confidence dropped a lot all of a sudden, even if he told himself in his heart that he could still kill Ye Tian, his body was a little nervous.

Soon.

Ye Tian had completely completed the breakthrough, his body had already completed the qualitative transformation, and he had completely reached the extreme realm of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

It was at this time that Ye Tiancai truly understood the reason why the Eternal Immortal Holy Body was called the First Holy Body.
